H

handleAgentClicked(Agent) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Handles a click on an agent in the graph view.
handleArrival(Agent) - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
 
handleBackgroundClick(Point2D) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Handles a click on the empty drawing area and creates a new node.
handleEdgeClicked(Edge) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Handles a click on an edge and removes it when deletion mode is active.
handleNodeClicked(Node) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Handles a node click.
hasConnection(Node, Node) - Method in class model.Graph
Checks whether two nodes are already connected in either direction.
hasEdge(Node, Node) - Method in class model.Graph
Checks whether a directed edge already exists from source to destination.
hashCode() - Method in class model.Agent
Returns a hash code based on agent id.
hashCode() - Method in class model.Node
 
hashCode() - Method in record class ui.CreateDialogs.AgentData
Returns a hash code value for this object.

Returns a hash code value for this object.

Returns a hash code value for this object.

Displays a simple help window explaining how to use the simulation.
